headline: Why Is HP (HPQ) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of personal computing and printing company HP (NYSE:HPQ) jumped 10.1% in the afternoon session after the company reported better-than-expected second-quarter fiscal 2026 results and provided a strong forecast, fueled by demand for its AI-powered personal computers.

headline: Super Micro Stock Rally Misses the Point From Dell Earnings
summary: Super Micro Computer  stock surged Friday as earnings from artificial-intelligence server peer  Dell Technologies  had investors excited about the growth ahead for hardware stocks.  Super Micro stock jumped 10% to $45.48 on Friday following Dell’s report.  Dell stock also soared, after the company said Thursday night that quarterly revenue for its AI-optimized servers rose 757% from the prior year.

headline: The difference between on-prem AI vs. data centers
summary: While Dell Technologies (DELL) stock surges by 30% in Friday trading after reporting first quarter earnings boosted by AI server sales, what exactly does it mean for a company to run "on-prem" AI — or on-premises — as opposed to running it through a traditional AI data center? TECHnalysis Research, LLC president Bob O'Donnell helps answer this question.

headline: When Diplomacy and Earnings Align; Wall Street Writes New Records
summary: Peace talk optimism and a parade of earnings results ranging from spectacular to sobering pushed all three major US indices to record highs on Thursday. One stock jumped 37%. Another quietly rewrote its own history after the close.
